formula.description: Name is the unique identifier for this formula.

description.description: Description explains what this formula does.

version.description: Version is the formula schema version.

pour.description:
Pour controls step materialization. When true, steps are created as
individual child beads (checkpointed, recoverable on crash). When
false (default), a single root-only wisp is created and the agent
reads step descriptions inline from the formula text.

steps.description: Steps defines the ordered sequence of work items in this formula.

Formula.description: Formula is a parsed formula definition from a *.formula.toml file.

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for this step within the formula.

title.description: Title is a short human-readable label for this step.

description.description: Description provides detailed instructions for this step.

needs.description: Needs lists step IDs that must complete before this step can start.

Step.description: Step is one step in a formula.

title: Gas City Formula
description: Schema for *.formula.toml — a formula definition file.
